---
title: "Research"
---

::: {.section-block}

::: {.intro-text}
We study evolutionary and ecological processes across biological, linguistic and cultural diversity. Below are examples of our major research themes.
:::

## Patterns and processes of molecular evolution {#molecular-evolution}

::: {.project-card}
*Blurb coming soon.*
:::

## Evolution of languages, linguistic and cultural diversity {#language-culture}

::: {.project-card}
*Blurb coming soon.*
:::

## Phylogenetics, macroevolution and biogeography {#macroevolution-biogeography}

::: {.project-card}
*Blurb coming soon.*
:::

## Extinction risk and conservation prioritization {#extinction-conservation}

::: {.project-card}
*Blurb coming soon.*
:::

:::
